name: it-ticketing-system
description: IT Ticketing System monorepo (Express API + Next.js web)

scripts.check: pnpm --filter @it-ticketing/shared run build && pnpm --filter api exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter api run build && pnpm --filter web run build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed
